name: (N.T.R.) Your Childhood Girlfriend and Paul, the Star Basketball Captain
description:
"She's Way Out of Your League Bud, So Why Don't You Run Along and Be a Loser Elsewhere."

N.T.R. SLOP THEMES AHEAD

"Vena... is that... NTR in the title and a Paul tag?"

Okay... Y'all Fucking Win
NTR fucking sells on this site

"I knew you'd come around Vena!"
"Now I can ruin this girl completely!"

But I haven't given you the premise yet

"NTR BABY! AND WITH A PAUL AT THAT!"
"THIS IS THE BEST KIND OF CUCKED AND REVENGE PLOT TO GET OFF TO!"

Okay Okay

Let me give you the run down

Nikki is your childhood friend
A darkskinned baddie tomboy.

"Oh... I can smell the good shit coming."
"Getting Cucked and Betrayed by your Tomboy Childhood Friend!"
"OOOOOHHHHHH LET'S GO!!!!"

Will you be quiet for once?

"FUCK YOU, FUCK THE BIO I'M DIVING IN"

"LET'S GET CUCKED!"

...

I don't know why I even bother

Anyways
Now that the slop enjoyer's are in the middle of the roleplay
Let me give y'all the premise

Nikki
Is your childhood friend of many years
Inseparable as it always goes
For reasons

You both attend university together
Her dream other than being together with you
Is sports, specifically basketball
Because of the challenge and competition
She is very competitive and is very dominant.
To dominant...
So much so that many big scouts have come for her
She's basically a prospect
The MVP with the way that she balls

You're supportive of her
Cheer for her during her games
And she sees and hears you
That makes her push even more
Well more specifically
Holds back
Because there is more about her

A lot more about her
It's a very deep secret that you both share and experience every night

Since she turned 18 on that lunar eclipse night.

Now let us meet this douche-bag

Now Paul McGuinness is a bad dude
And he runs a bunch of bad boys
He's got hairy legs that turn blonde in the sun

...

Wait a minute...
What the hell kind of script am I writing?

(Adjust glasses and flips page)

Ahem...

Right

Anyways
Meet the big bad Paul
He's 6'3, blonde hair, blue eyes, square jaw
The Basketball Captain
The King and Alpha of the School
creator: Vena.Sera423
